perspectives.description: John is a popular online influencer who has the power to shape opinions and influence his followers. His recent hate speech puts his reputation and follower count at risk, forcing him to consider the impact of his words.
A follower of John who feels uncomfortable and hurt by his recent divisive rhetoric. This individual is torn between their admiration for John and their moral stance against hate speech.

A member of the minority group targeted by John's hate speech, who experiences the negative consequences of his rhetoric in their daily life. This person feels the societal impact of the influencer's words but has little power to change the situation.
